seoTitle: Bom Bom vs Bomaderry — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bom Bom and Bomaderry. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bom Bom vs Bomaderry: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bom Bom and Bomaderry.
heading: Bom Bom vs Bomaderry — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bom Bom, New South Wales and Bomaderry, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bom Bom has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Bomaderry (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bom Bom or Bomaderry safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bom Bom has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Bomaderry scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bom Bom scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Bomaderry scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bom Bom or Bomaderry?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bom Bom has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
